response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 6+ years at Staff/Senior levels, demonstrating mastery of TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages. Currently architecting AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, directly addressing a required skill. Strong testing and software craftsmanship focus evidenced through workshops, courses, and multiple TDD-driven roles. Meets or exceeds all core technical requirements. Minor gaps (Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned) are likely non-issues given demonstrated depth in related technologies.
strengths: Staff/Senior-level full-stack engineer with deep expertise across frontend (React, Ember.js) and backend (Node.js, Kotlin, Java, DLang, C++)
Currently architecting AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver, directly addressing the required AI agent development skill
Proven software craftsmanship: TDD advocate, organized testing workshops, created testing libraries, consistently elevated code quality across roles
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js/TypeScript foundation; framework familiarity should be confirmed
Vitest and Playwright not mentioned by name; testing expertise is clear but specific framework experience should be verified
Authentication/security expertise not explicitly highlighted; implied through engineering rigor but merits discussion during interview

key_factors.factor: AI agent development and infrastructure experience
Full-stack seniority level and primary stack alignment
Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned
